title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 48. LOUISIANA CONSUMER FUEL CHOICE ACT

§3041. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Consumer Fuel Choice Act".

            Acts 2022, No. 546, §1, eff. June 17, 2022.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 48. LOUISIANA CONSUMER FUEL CHOICE ACT
§3041.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Consumer Fuel
Choice Act".
Acts 2022, No. 546, §1, eff. June 17, 2022.
